mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer for toxic exposure or is it just workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Usually, you are limited to workers comp, but if the exposure was intentional or caused by a third-party manufacturer's defective product, you may be able to file a separate lawsuit for pain and suffering.
